data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Credentials provisioned live: rebar-ci-bot (id 1000008) in Service Users; SSM g2p-github-pat + ci-gerrit-ssh-key; GitHub vars GERRIT_SERVER/SSH_USER/KNOWN_HOSTS/URL + secret GERRIT_SSH_PRIVKEY set (runtime operator actions). PAT via materialize-g2p-config.sh per in-container ADR-0022 (supersedes the stale fetch-secrets.sh AC). Recorded in runbook C.1.". Session: 8048b72a1.
